name: @hasna/sessions
description: Search and sync AI coding sessions (Claude, Codex, Gemini) — unified SQLite index with full-text search

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun run build:cli && bun run build:mcp && bun run build:server && bun run build:lib && bun run build:sdk && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist
scripts.build:externals: echo '@hasna/contracts is bundled (not external) so the client HTTP storage flip ships in dist; all other deps stay external'
scripts.build:cli: bun build src/cli/index.tsx --outdir dist/cli --target bun --external @hasna/events --external @inkjs/ui --external @modelcontextprotocol/sdk --external chalk --external commander --external ink --external openai --external pg --external react --external react/jsx-runtime --external react/jsx-dev-runtime --external zod
scripts.build:mcp: bun build src/mcp/index.ts --outdir dist/mcp --target bun --external @hasna/events --external @inkjs/ui --external @modelcontextprotocol/sdk --external chalk --external commander --external ink --external openai --external pg --external react --external react/jsx-runtime --external react/jsx-dev-runtime --external zod
scripts.build:server: bun build src/server/index.ts --outdir dist/server --target bun --external @hasna/events --external @inkjs/ui --external @modelcontextprotocol/sdk --external chalk --external commander --external ink --external openai --external pg --external react --external react/jsx-runtime --external react/jsx-dev-runtime --external zod
scripts.build:lib: bun build src/index.ts src/storage.ts --outdir dist --target bun --external @hasna/events --external @inkjs/ui --external @modelcontextprotocol/sdk --external chalk --external commander --external ink --external openai --external pg --external react --external react/jsx-runtime --external react/jsx-dev-runtime --external zod
scripts.build:sdk: bun build src/sdk/index.ts --outdir dist/sdk --target bun --packages external
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run typecheck && bun test && bun run build

author: Hasna <andrei@hasna.com>
